commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=79a03cd21b83d74ba6b96c8bca91666188f152c4)
commands.review_summary:
The branch adds a cron announce transcript mirror to `sendCronAnnouncePayloadStrict` and failure-alert delivery, covers the mirror payload in `src/cron/delivery.failure-notify.test.ts`, and adds a changelog fix entry.

PR surface: Source +44, Tests +41, Docs +1. Total +86 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence live reproduction was run in this review. The source path is clear: current main omits the mirror in `src/cron/delivery.ts`, and the PR adds it, but the submitted proof is limited to mocked unit coverage and local checks.
commands.review_followup: A maintainer needs to decide the lock-safe mirror policy and request real behavior proof; automation cannot supply the contributor's missing live setup evidence.

target.title: [codex] fix cron announce delivery transcript mirrors
target.body:
## Summary
- Mirror session-bound cron announce helper deliveries into the destination session transcript.
- Carry agent/job metadata through the announce delivery helper and use a stable idempotency key for transcript mirrors.
- Add regression coverage for `sendCronAnnouncePayloadStrict` and note the fix in the changelog.

## Verification
- `pnpm test src/cron/delivery.failure-notify.test.ts`
- `pnpm check:changed`

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Cron announce helper delivery could send a session-bound message to a chat transport without appending the delivered assistant text to the destination session transcript, leaving a follow-up user reply without the message it was replying to.

Real environment tested: Local OpenClaw checkout at `/Users/dross/openclaw-cron-transcript-mirror`, branch `codex/fix-cron-session-transcript-mirror`, rebased onto `origin/main` at `e4332f7cff2b27c8f306d29688a6d1f175d25b66`.

Exact steps or command run after this patch:
- `pnpm test src/cron/delivery.failure-notify.test.ts`
- `pnpm check:changed`

Evidence after fix: The new regression test `mirrors successful announces into the resolved delivery session transcript` captures the `sendDurableMessageBatch` request and asserts the `mirror` object includes the resolved destination `sessionKey`, `agentId`, delivered text, and a `cron-announce-mirror:v1:<jobId>:` idempotency key. `pnpm check:changed` also completed successfully for the changed production, test, and changelog files.

Observed result after fix: The focused Vitest shard passed 5/5 tests, and `pnpm check:changed` exited zero on the rebased branch. For session-bound cron announce helper delivery, the same durable outbound call now receives a transcript mirror request for the destination session.

What was not tested: I did not run a live production WhatsApp cron job from this PR branch; validation was by the local OpenClaw test gate and targeted code-path regression coverage.
target.author: vishalj99
